name: Metal Horse
description:
Metal Horse Sculpture

Bring bold character into your space with this handcrafted Metal Horse — a sculptural accent for living rooms, studios, offices, and entryways. The silhouette captures a powerful mid-motion stance.

Product highlights

  • Hand-finished metal horse with a strong silhouette
  • Ideal for aesthetic shelves and consoles
  • Multiple sizes and metal finishes
  • Durable indoor display quality

Material & craftsmanship

Precision-cut and hand-finished metal with a protective coating for indoor display. Minor texture variation is normal and adds artisan character.

Size options

  • Small (30 cm) — desks & shelves
  • Medium (40 cm) — consoles
  • Large (55 cm) — statement pieces

Finish options

  • Matte Black
  • Antique Gold
  • Bronze
  • Copper

Care instructions

Dust with a soft dry cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners and prolonged moisture. Indoor use recommended.

name: Tree of Life Metal Wall Art (50–70 cm)
description:
Tree of Life Metal Wall Art

Make a lasting focal point with this Tree of Life Metal Wall Art, sized for impact at 50–70 cm. Roots, trunk, and canopy symbolize growth while reading as clean contemporary metal décor.

Product highlights

  • Intricate tree-of-life cut-out design
  • 50 / 60 / 70 cm width options
  • Multiple finish options
  • Ready for standard wall mounting

Material & craftsmanship

Precision-cut and hand-finished metal with a protective coating for indoor display. Minor texture variation is normal and adds artisan character.

Size options

  • 50 cm
  • 60 cm
  • 70 cm

Finish options

  • Matte Black
  • Antique Gold
  • Bronze
  • Silver

Installation

Use wall plugs/screws suited to drywall, brick, or concrete. Hang at eye level, typically 15–25 cm above a sofa or console.

Care instructions

Dust with a soft dry cloth. Avoid abrasive cleaners and prolonged moisture. Indoor use recommended.
